content.thinking: Let me start by examining the current state of the Spark cluster and data skew benchmark deployment. I'll check the pods, jobs, and logs to understand what's happening.

content.text: Let me start by checking the current state of the Spark cluster and jobs.

input.command: kubectl get pods -n spark-skew 2>&1 && echo "---" && kubectl get jobs -n spark-skew 2>&1
